stemHtml: A flight crew has a layover after a long-haul flight where they have to spend the night. How many points do they gain or lose while sleeping or while staying awake respectively?

options.a: They gain 2 points for each hour of sleep and lose 1 point for each hour of staying awake.
options.b: They gain 1 point for a short rest and lose 2 points for each hour of staying awake.
options.c: They gain 2 points for each hour of sleep and lose 2 points for each hour of staying awake.
options.d: They gain 1 point for each hour of any rest and lose 1 point for each hour of staying awake.
